title: Hospitality
description: Arrival, welcome, shelter, food, clothing, and obligations between host and guest.

title: Watchfulness
description: Caution, observation, and the risks assumed in unfamiliar social spaces.

title: Wisdom
description: Practical judgment, restraint, learning, and the limits of knowledge.

title: Speech
description: Speaking, boasting, silence, listening, and social consequence.

title: Travel
description: Counsel for movement, unfamiliar roads, and life away from home.

title: Drink and Moderation
description: Ale, memory, self-command, and social conduct.

title: Life and Death
description: Mortality, sickness, survival, burial, and the value assigned to living.

title: Reputation
description: Renown, memory, memorials, deeds, and what may remain after death.

title: Wealth
description: Possession, poverty, instability, pride, and social judgment.

title: Kinship
description: Children, relatives, remembrance, inheritance, and obligation.

title: Runes
description: Passages explicitly concerning runes, knowledge, and magical counsel.
